    <script>

function pushLCSearchHistory(findK){
        let searchHistory = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("searchHistory")) || [];
        console.log(searchHistory)
        if(!searchHistory.includes(findK)){
            localStorage.setItem("searchHistory",JSON.stringify([findK,...searchHistory].slice(0,10)))
        }
    }

    $(document).on("submit",".list-search",function(){
        const findK = $(".list-search .ub-search-block-a input").val();
        pushLCSearchHistory(findK)
    })
    $(document).on("keydown",".list-search input",function(e){
        if(e.keyCode == 13){
            const findK = $(".list-search .ub-search-block-a input").val();
            pushLCSearchHistory(findK)
        }
    })


    $(document).on("focus",".list-search input",function(e){
        let searchHistory = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("searchHistory")) || [];
        if(!$(this).val().trim()){
            if(searchHistory.length == 0){
                $(".list-search .search-hot.search-dropdown").show();
            }else{
                $(".list-search .search-history.search-dropdown .list").html(searchHistory.map(i=>{
                    return `
                    <div class="search-history-line">
                        <span><a href="https://baogao.iqianfeng.com/wenku/search?keywords=${i}">${i}</a></span>
                        <span class="close"></span>
                    </div>
                    `
                }).join(""))
                $(".list-search .search-history.search-dropdown").show();
            }
        }
    })


    $(document).on("click",".list-search .search-history.search-dropdown .clear-box",function(){
        localStorage.setItem("searchHistory","[]");
        $(this).parents(".list-search .search-dropdown").hide();
    })


    $(document).on("click",".list-search .search-history.search-dropdown .close",function(e){

        e.stopPropagation();

        let searchHistory = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("searchHistory")) || [];
        const findK = $(this).parents(".search-history-line").text().trim();
        const lcindex = searchHistory.indexOf(findK);
        console.log(searchHistory,findK,lcindex)

        searchHistory = searchHistory.slice(0,lcindex).concat(searchHistory.slice(lcindex+1))

        localStorage.setItem("searchHistory",JSON.stringify(searchHistory));
        if(searchHistory.length){
            $(".list-search .search-history.search-dropdown .list").html(searchHistory.map(i=>{
                return `
                <div class="search-history-line">
                    <span><a href="https://baogao.iqianfeng.com/wenku/search?keywords=${i}">${i}</a></span>
                    <span class="close"></span>
                </div>
                `
            }).join(""))
        }else{
            $(".list-search .search-history.search-dropdown").hide();
            $(".list-search .search-hot.search-dropdown").show();
        }
    })

    $(document).on("click",function(e){
        const _target = $(".list-search");
        if(!_target.is(e.target) && _target.has(e.target).length === 0){
            $(".list-search .search-dropdown").hide();
        }
    })

</script>

        <script>

        $("#loginPhone").show();


        // sh --

        let loginPwd = false

        function chgLogin(type){


            loginPwd = type


            if(loginPwd){

                $('#lgh').removeClass('active')
                $('#lghP').removeClass('active').addClass('active')
                $('.phoneBox').hide()
                $('.pwdBox').show()

                $('#loginPwd').val(1)
            }else{

                $('#lgh').removeClass('active').addClass('active')
                $('#lghP').removeClass('active')
                $('.phoneBox').show()
                $('.pwdBox').hide()

                $('#loginPwd').val(0)
            }
        }

        $('.pwdBox').hide()
        $(function() {
            new window.api.commonVerify({
                generateServer: '/login/phone_verify',
                selectorTarget: 'input[name=phone]',
                selectorGenerate: '[data-phone-verify-generate]',
                selectorCountdown: '[data-phone-verify-countdown]',
                selectorRegenerate: '[data-phone-verify-regenerate]',
                // selectorCaptcha: 'input[name=captcha]',
                // selectorCaptchaImg: 'img[data-captcha]',
                interval: 60,
            }, window.api.dialog);

            switchLoginMethod();
        });
        $("#phoneVerify").click(function() {
            $.ajax({
                url: "/login/phone_verify",
                type: "POST",
                data: {
                    phone: $("input[name='phone']").val(),
                    captcha: $("input[name='captcha']").val()
                },
                success: function(res) {
                    layer.msg(res.msg);
                }
            })
        })

        // 用户主动刷新 二维码
        function reloadCode(){
            // console.log("主动刷新");

            $.ajax({
                url: "https://c.iqianfeng.com/a/mp/getQrCode?type=bg",
                type: "GET",
                async: false,
                success: function(res) {
                    response = res;

                    const mpLoginInfo = getMpLoginQrCode();
                    window.timer = mpLoginInfo.task;
                    $("#reloadCode").siblings("img").attr("src",mpLoginInfo.qrcode);
                    $("#reloadCode").css("visibility","hidden");
                }
            })
        }

        var timer;
        var response;
        function showLoginPage() {
            var content = $("#loginTemplate").html();
            $("#loginTemplate").html('');

            $.ajax({
                url: "https://c.iqianfeng.com/a/mp/getQrCode?type=bg",
                type: "GET",
                async: false,
                success: function(res) {
                    response = res;
                    layer.open({
                        type: 1,
                        content: content,
                        skin: "layui-layer-login",
                        title: false,
                        area: ['auto', 'auto'],
                        // area: ['550px', '323px'],
                        end: function() {
                            $("#loginTemplate").html(content);

                            clearInterval(window.timer);
                        },
                        fix: false,
                        resize: false
                    });
                }
            });

        }

        function getMpLoginQrCode() {
            $("#qrcode").html("");
            var qrcode = $("#qrcode").qrcode({
                render: "canvas",
                width: 300,
                height: 300,
                background: "#ffffff",
                foreground: "#000000",
                text: response.url
            });
            var canvas = qrcode.find('canvas').get(0);
            var imgSrc = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpg');

            const currentTime = new Date().getTime();
            var task = setInterval(() => {
                setTimeout(function() {
                    $.get('https://c.iqianfeng.com/a/mp/checkLoginForBg', { ticket: response.ticket }, function(data) {
                        // console.log(data);

                        if(new Date().getTime() > currentTime + 1000 * 60){
                            clearInterval(task);
                            $("#reloadCode").css("visibility","visible");
                            layer.msg("二维码已过期！请重新获取");
                        }
                        if (data.success == 'true') {
                            clearInterval(task);
                            $.get('/api/mplogin', { openid: data.openid }, function(response) {
                                if (response.code == 0) {
                                    layer.msg('您已绑定手机！' + response.msg);

                                    setTimeout(() => {
                                        window.location.reload();
                                    }, 2000);

                                } else if (response.code == 1) {
                                    switchLoginMethod();
                                    layer.msg('请绑定手机！' + response.msg);
                                    $("#lgb").html("绑定");
                                    $("#lgh").html("关联手机号");
                                    $(".wxs").hide();

                                    // sh --
                                    $('.pwdBox').show()
                                    $('#lghP').hide()
                                    $('#loginPwd').val(0)
                                }
                            });
                        }
                    })
                }, 0)
            }, 1000);

            return {
                qrcode: imgSrc,
                task: task
            };
        }

        function switchLoginMethod() {
            if(typeof(loginMethod) == 'undefined'){
                loginMethod = 2;
            }

            loginMethod = loginMethod === 1 ? 2 : 1;
            console.log(loginMethod)
            if (loginMethod === 1) {
                $("#loginMp").hide();
                $("#loginPhone").show();

                clearInterval(window.timer);
            } else if (loginMethod === 2) {
                $("#loginMp").show();
                $("#loginPhone").hide();
                phoneLoginTemplate = $("#loginShow").html();
                const mpLoginInfo = getMpLoginQrCode();

                // console.log("赋值");
                window.timer = mpLoginInfo.task;
                var imgSrc = mpLoginInfo.qrcode;
                var html = `<div class="web-login login">
                                <div class="title">
                                    <i class="iconfont icon-wechat tw-align-middle"></i>微信扫码 关注公众号立即登录
                                </div>
                                <div class="content flex">
                                    <div class="code" title="">
                                    <div>
                                        <div class="shadow" onclick="reloadCode()" id="reloadCode">点击刷新</div>
                                        <img src="${imgSrc}"></div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="tips">
                                        <p>
                                            <i class="icon iconfont icon-bell"></i>新用户注册即刻免费下载全站文档，无需任何费用
                                        </p>
                                        <p>关注公众号，更多好礼敬请期待！</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="protocol">
                                    <span>登录即表示您同意<a href="https://baogao.iqianfeng.com/member/agreement" style="color: hsla(0,0%,100%,.6)!important;" target="_blank" rel="nofollow">《千峰报告网站服务协议》</a></span>
                                    <a class="other pointer" href="javascript:switchLoginMethod();">验证码登陆</a>
                                </div>
                            </div>`;
                $("#loginMp").html(html);
            }
        }
        </script>
</div></div></footer>
